commandPalette.createNew: New account or holding (Accounts page only)

settings.title: Settings
settings.appDescription: Assets Tracker is designed to help you visualize your high-level wealth journey. By tracking asset growth through periodic snapshots, you can focus on the big picture instead of daily trading noise.
settings.syncPricesDesc: Fetch the latest market prices from Yahoo Finance and CoinGecko.
settings.syncSnapshotDesc: Manually record your current balances to the history chart.
settings.densityDescription: Control the spacing of cards and rows
settings.colorSchemaDescription: Choose an accent color for light and dark mode
settings.signOutDesc: Securely log out of your account on this device.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyDescription: Start by adding your first account — a bank account, brokerage, crypto wallet, or anything else you want to track.

goals.title: Goals
goals.subtitle: Track milestones toward your net worth targets.
goals.emptyDescription: Set a target — like "$1M net worth by 2030" — and track your progress here.

form.name: Goal Name
form.namePlaceholder: e.g. $1M Net Worth, House Down Payment
form.targetDateHint: Optional — leave blank for an open-ended goal.

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.subtitle: Month-over-month breakdown of your net worth.
analysis.noData: Not enough snapshots yet. Analysis appears after a few days of history.
analysis.cashFlowSubtitle: Contributions vs. market performance each month.
analysis.topMoversSubtitle: Accounts with the largest value change in this period.
analysis.topMoversNoData: Not enough history to show movers.
analysis.cashFlowNote: Contributions reflect cash deposits and withdrawals only.
analysis.attributionSubtitle: Which accounts drove your net worth change this period.
analysis.attributionNoData: Not enough history to compute attribution.
analysis.attributionNote: Market performance = total change minus cash contributions. Prices use current rates (v1 approximation).

projections.title: Projections
projections.subtitle: Estimate when you'll reach financial independence.
projections.withdrawalRateHint: The % of your portfolio you spend each year in retirement. At 4% (the classic rule), your FIRE Number is 25× your annual expenses — historically enough to last 30+ years.
projections.noData: Take a net worth snapshot to start projecting.
projections.step1Desc: Enter your Annual Expenses to calculate your FIRE Number — the portfolio value that can fund your lifestyle indefinitely without working.
projections.step2Desc: Annual Savings is pre-filled from your last 12 months of deposits. Adjust the expected return and withdrawal rate to match your situation.
projections.step3Desc: The chart overlays your actual net worth history (solid line) with the projected path (dashed). Markers show where your portfolio crosses the FIRE target.
projections.fireRuleBody: The withdrawal rate is not your yearly expenses — it's the percentage you draw from your total portfolio each year. At 4%, your portfolio needs to be large enough that 4% of it equals your annual spending:
projections.fireRuleFootnote: The remaining portfolio stays invested and keeps growing, which is why 4% has historically lasted 30+ years. A lower rate (e.g. 3%) requires a larger portfolio but is safer; a higher rate (e.g. 5%) needs less but carries more risk.
projections.indFireNumberDesc: The total portfolio size you need to retire. Calculated as Annual Expenses ÷ Withdrawal Rate. At 4%, this equals 25× your annual spending.
projections.indCurrentNWDesc: Your most recent tracked net worth from the latest daily snapshot. This is the starting point for all projections.
projections.indProgressDesc: Current Net Worth as a percentage of your FIRE Number. Reaches 100% the moment you're financially independent.
projections.indFireDateDesc: The estimated year your portfolio crosses the FIRE Number, assuming your inputs hold constant. Based on deterministic (not Monte Carlo) math.

history.title: Net Worth History
history.noData: No snapshots yet. Take a snapshot from the dashboard to start tracking.

trendChart.title: Net Worth Trend
trendChart.noData: No data to display yet. Add accounts and your net worth will be tracked automatically at midnight (UTC+8).

currencyExposure.title: Currency Exposure
currencyExposure.noExposure: No assets found to compute exposure.

accountsList.manageOrderHint: Drag accounts to reorder. Pinned accounts always stay above unpinned ones.
accountsList.manageOrderScopeHint: Ordering is global within each type (Assets/Liabilities), not per category.
accountsList.noAccounts: No accounts yet. Add your first account to get started.
accountsList.deleteConfirm: Delete this account? This cannot be undone.

quickAddHolding.labelSearch: Search by name or ticker symbol
quickAddHolding.cantFind: Can't find what you're looking for?
quickAddHolding.noAccountFound: No {category} account found. A new "{name}" account will be created automatically.

optionFlow.title: Add Option Contract
optionFlow.chainLoadFailed: Failed to load option chain for {symbol}
optionFlow.closeHint: Set to 0 to close the position.

accountDetail.noHoldings: No holdings yet. Add stocks, ETFs, or crypto.
accountDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete this account? This cannot be undone.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.exportDescription: Download all your accounts, holdings, and transaction history as a JSON file.
dataManagement.importDescription: Upload a previously exported JSON file to restore your data. Warning: This will overwrite your current data.
dataManagement.confirmImport: Are you sure you want to import data? This will REPLACE ALL your current accounts and transactions. This cannot be undone.
dataManagement.invalidFile: Invalid file format. Please upload a JSON file exported from this app.
dataManagement.parseError: JSON Syntax Error: The file you uploaded is not a valid JSON. Please check the file content.
dataManagement.importSuccessMessage: Your data has been restored successfully. Please refresh the page to see the changes.

installApp.title: Add to Home Screen
installApp.description: Access Assets Tracker like a native app directly from your home screen.
installApp.platform: Works in Safari on iPhone and iPad
installApp.step1: Open this page in Safari on your iPhone or iPad
installApp.step3: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
installApp.step4: Tap "Add" — the app icon will appear on your home screen

login.title: Assets Tracker
login.subtitle: Securely access your financial portfolio
login.trust1: Google OAuth — we never store your password
login.trust2: Your data is private & never sold
login.trust3: Only you can see your portfolio
login.footerBefore: Your data stays private. Read our

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How Assets Tracker handles your data
privacy.section1Body: When you sign in with Google, we receive your name, email address, and profile picture. Any financial data (accounts, holdings, balances) is entered by you manually and stored in your private database.
privacy.section2Body: We never access your real bank or brokerage accounts. We do not collect your passwords, browsing history, location, or contacts.
privacy.section3Body: We fetch public market prices from Yahoo Finance and CoinGecko using only the ticker symbols you enter. No personal information is sent to these services.
privacy.section4Body: Your data is never sold, rented, or shared with third parties for any purpose.
privacy.section5Body: You can export all your data or delete your account at any time from the Settings page.
privacy.section6Body: Sign-in is handled entirely by Google OAuth. We receive only a secure session token — your Google password is never shared with or stored by this app.
privacy.section7Body: We use Vercel Analytics and Speed Insights to understand basic usage and page performance. These tools do not include your manually entered account names, holdings, balances, or transaction notes.
privacy.section8Body: For privacy or data requests, email us at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Rules and guidelines for using Assets Tracker
terms.section1Body: By accessing and using Assets Tracker, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by these terms, please do not use this service.
terms.section2Body: Assets Tracker is provided 'as is' for personal financial tracking. You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, restrict or inhibit anyone else's use and enjoyment of the service.
terms.section3Body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and for all activities that occur under your account. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, or remove or edit content in our sole discretion.
terms.section4Body: The information provided by Assets Tracker is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of any market data provided.
terms.section5Body: Assets Tracker shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential or exemplary damages resulting from your use of the service or any reliance on the information provided.
terms.section6Body: We reserve the right to modify these terms from time to time at our sole discretion. Your continued use of the service following the posting of changes to these terms will mean you accept those changes.

transactionHistory.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?
transactionHistory.deleteConfirmSymbol: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction for {symbol}?
